scripts.validate:compose: docker compose --env-file .env.example -f infra/compose/dev/docker-compose.yml config --quiet && docker compose --env-file .env.example -f infra/compose/dev/docker-compose.yml --profile full config --quiet
scripts.validate:codex: uv run python -c "import json, pathlib, tomllib; root=pathlib.Path('.'); tomllib.loads((root/'.codex/config.toml').read_text()); opencode=json.loads((root/'opencode.json').read_text()); docker=json.loads((root/'.docker/mcp-profile-docker.json').read_text()); kube=json.loads((root/'.docker/mcp-profile-kubernetes.json').read_text()); assert set(opencode['mcp']) == {'stormlead', 'docker', 'kubernetes'}; assert docker['id'] == 'stormlead_docker'; assert kube['id'] == 'stormlead_kubernetes'; forbidden_docker={'createRepository', 'updateRepositoryInfo'}; forbidden_kube={'cleanup', 'exec_in_pod', 'install_helm_chart', 'kubectl_apply', 'kubectl_create', 'kubectl_delete', 'kubectl_generic', 'kubectl_patch', 'kubectl_rollout', 'kubectl_scale', 'node_management', 'uninstall_helm_chart', 'upgrade_helm_chart'}; docker_tools=set(docker['servers'][1]['tools']); kube_tools=set(kube['servers'][0]['tools']); assert not forbidden_docker & docker_tools; assert not forbidden_kube & kube_tools; print('agent MCP config valid')" && codex --version && npm run mcp:stormlead:check
scripts.lint:python: uv run ruff check services libs scripts/smoke_e2e.py scripts/replay_lead.py scripts/simulate_v1_leads.py
scripts.validate:local: npm run validate:compose && npm run lint:python && npm run typecheck:python && npm run test:python
